title: Chitrapathi is a survival strategist not a villain
source_observation: Her actions arise from household continuity reputation and protection concerns
risk: A simple evil elder stereotype would erase social conditions and character complexity
decision: Present calculation affection fear and harmful choices together

title: Artistic lineage is knowledge not corruption
source_observation: The epic describes extensive skills associated with performing women
risk: Performance could be reduced to temptation or decoration
decision: Show training discipline memory and labour behind artistic identity

title: Udayakumaran retains agency
source_observation: Chitrapathi influences but does not command the prince
risk: She could become a convenient scapegoat for male violence
decision: Treat her persuasion as a factor while preserving his responsibility

title: Queen plea is accountability
source_observation: She later seeks Manimekalai's release after the crisis
risk: The film could ignore her responsibility or make redemption too easy
decision: Show a woman facing the consequences of her own strategy while acting to repair harm

title: Security versus autonomy conflict
source_observation: Chitrapathi and Manimekalai respond differently to vulnerability
risk: Conflict could become purity versus immorality
decision: Frame their disagreement around different survival systems
